assignments.name: route_handler.next_step
assignments.value: Sales team should review the inquiry and prepare a follow-up.

assignments.name: route_handler.next_step
assignments.value: Human reviewer should inspect the call summary and contact the caller.

assignments.name: route_handler.next_step
assignments.value: Support team should review the issue and create a ticket if needed.

assignments.name: route_handler.next_step
assignments.value: Billing team should review payment, invoice, or refund details.

assignments.name: route_handler.next_step
assignments.value: Operations should inspect missing or unclear call data.

assignments.name: route_handler.next_step
assignments.value: General team should review and follow up if appropriate.

parameters.content:
AI Voice Ops Router

Receives synthetic AI voice call payloads through a local n8n test webhook, validates and normalizes the call data, classifies intent and urgency, routes the call to the correct placeholder queue, prepares a structured call log, and returns a clean JSON response.

Built for portfolio demonstration using synthetic data only.

Local n8n testing

This workflow is tested through the n8n test webhook while the workflow is manually executing.

External AI voice platforms cannot call localhost directly. Later testing would require synthetic payloads only, a secure temporary tunnel, or a public n8n deployment.

Do not publish webhook URLs or tunnel URLs.

Intake and validation

Webhook receives the call result payload.
Normalize Call Payload trims strings, lowercases selected fields, converts booleans, and converts call duration to a number.
Validate Call Payload checks required identifiers, caller identity, call content, voice platform, timestamps, email format, and duration.

Classification and routing

Classify Intent and Urgency uses keyword-based logic to classify calls as emergency, sales, support, billing, general, or manual review.
Emergency and high-urgency signals override normal intent routing.
Route Call sends each item to the matching placeholder queue.

Placeholder route handlers

Each branch represents a future operational destination:
- urgent human review
- sales follow-up
- support queue
- billing queue
- manual review
- general queue

No real external systems are connected in this portfolio phase.

Logging and response

Prepare Call Log creates a structured event record suitable for later storage in Sheets, Airtable, a database, or an incident log.
Respond to Webhook returns a compact JSON response with route, classification, validation status, and message.
